name: external_fixture_demo
description: Demonstrates ``fixture_repo`` + ``resources`` in the sibling _config.json. The runner clones the belt repo once into the per-run cache, every scenario gets an isolated worktree off that clone, and the listed resource is copied into ``.belt/sample-resource.txt`` before the agent starts. Tagged ``dry-run-only`` because the clone runs against GitHub (not deterministic for offline CI). To exercise it locally: belt eval examples/scenarios/showcase/external-fixture --tags dry-run-only --dry-run.

turns.message: Read .belt/sample-resource.txt and reply with just the MARKER line you find inside it.
